evidence: exporter/datadog/exporter_test.go: TestExportPostsMappedPayload covers real exporter request metadata and mapped payloads through httptest.
exporter/datadog/exporter_test.go: TestValidateCredentialsClassifiesAuth and TestExportClassifiesHTTPStatus cover auth and status failure classification without live credentials.

exporter/datadog/exporter_test.go: TestExportRetriesRetryableStatusWithBackoff, TestExportStopsAfterRetryExhaustion, and TestExportStopsWhenRetrySleepIsCanceled cover retry behavior against local fake HTTP endpoints.
exporter/datadog/exporter_test.go: TestFlushDeliversPendingRetryableExport and TestFlushCanceledPreservesPendingRetryableExport cover flush behavior for pending retryable exports.
exporter/datadog/exporter_test.go uses clearEnv and httptest/local transports for these paths, so go test ./... requires no live Datadog credentials.
